1.description: get Trondheim municipality bbox and kommunenummer

2.description: select quick-clay mapping polygons within Trondheim bbox

3.description: select parcels (teig) in Trondheim by kommunenummer

4.description: find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons

5.description: deduplicate to one row per teig

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
  ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
  ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT kartleggingsomradeid, kartleggingsomradenavn, kartleggingstatus, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, ST_Envelope(omrade) AS geom
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084, 7010675.56, 285864.4299986598, 7051059.45, 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- right_geom: "geom"
